name: Infrastructure Change Monitoring
description: Monitors for unauthorized infrastructure changes by comparing detected configuration changes against the approved change management window. Authorized changes are logged for audit. Unauthorized changes are analyzed by AI for risk assessment, and if deemed high-risk, an automatic revert is triggered after approval from the operations lead. All unauthorized changes generate a security incident ticket and team notification.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Terraform Cloud
required_integrations.reason: Detect infrastructure state drift and revert unauthorized changes

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Check for approved change requests and create incident tickets for unauthorized changes

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the operations team of unauthorized infrastructure changes

config.description: Triggers when an infrastructure configuration change is detected by the monitoring system

config.query: SELECT cr.id, cr.status, cr.approved_by, cr.window_start, cr.window_end FROM change_requests cr WHERE cr.status = 'approved' AND cr.window_start <= NOW() AND cr.window_end >= NOW() AND cr.affected_resources LIKE '%{{trigger_1.alert.resource_id}}%'
config.description: Check if there is an approved change request covering this infrastructure change within the current maintenance window
Determine if the detected change matches an approved change request within the maintenance window

parameters.note: Infrastructure change on {{trigger_1.alert.resource_id}} matched approved change request {{code_1.change_request[0].id}} (approved by {{code_1.change_request[0].approved_by}}). Logged for audit.

config.description: Log the authorized change for compliance audit trail

config.additional_instructions: Assess the risk of this unauthorized infrastructure change. Determine if the change introduces security vulnerabilities, compliance violations, or service disruption risk. Recommend whether an immediate revert is warranted.
config.description: AI-powered risk assessment of the unauthorized infrastructure change
Determine if the unauthorized change is high-risk enough to warrant an immediate revert
Operations lead must approve the automatic revert of the unauthorized high-risk change

parameters.reason: Unauthorized change reverted — Risk: {{analyze_1.risk_level}}, Approved by: {{approval_1.approver}}

config.description: Revert the unauthorized infrastructure change to the last known good state via Terraform
Create a security incident ticket for the unauthorized infrastructure change
Alert the operations team about the unauthorized infrastructure change
